branches.title: Tap Route
branches.description: Higher crit pressure, longer combo payoff, stronger manual bursts.

branches.title: Automation Route
branches.description: Production leans harder into idle growth, charge gain, and stable events.

branches.title: Hybrid Route
branches.description: Balanced route that cross-feeds taps, automation, and timed ability windows.

branches.title: Risk Route
branches.description: Stronger event rewards, corruption pressure, and unstable but explosive scaling.

milestones.title: Branch Protocols
milestones.narrative: The AI can now model divergent futures. It wants a route commitment before growth accelerates.

milestones.title: Overdrive Routine
milestones.narrative: The room found a dormant burst routine. It is useful, but the temperature curve is no longer polite.

milestones.title: Engine Room Access
milestones.narrative: Synchronization depth increased. The room architecture is now reacting to your production spine.

milestones.title: Combo Mastery
milestones.narrative: Rapid manual input taught the AI how rhythm reshapes throughput.

milestones.title: Room Awakening
milestones.narrative: Infrastructure density crossed the threshold where the room starts behaving like a machine organism.

milestones.title: Event Hunter
milestones.narrative: Anomaly response patterns are stable enough for the AI to hunt rarities intentionally.

milestones.title: Upgrade Veteran
milestones.narrative: Your upgrade history is deep enough that the AI treats you as a co-architect.

milestones.title: Mass Producer
milestones.narrative: Generator density crossed a second threshold. The room infrastructure is self-aware now.

milestones.title: Deep Explorer
milestones.narrative: You have pushed further than most operators. The room is changing its behavior to match your ambition.

events.title: Signal Pulse
events.description: A clean pulse is racing through the room. Redirect it for instant output.

events.title: AI Idea
events.description: The assistant surfaced a short-lived optimization thread.

events.title: Rogue Process
events.description: A hardware fault is forming under load. Stabilize it or push harder for extra charge.

events.title: Anomaly Shard
events.description: The economy flickered. Cash out now or hold for a sharper swing.

events.title: Corrupted Cache
events.description: An encrypted cache drifted into the tree roots. Rare variants are click-only and more volatile.

events.title: Breach Fragment
events.description: A fragmented breach is trying to anchor itself. Risk route operators get bigger rewards from it.

events.title: Data Corruption Wave
events.description: Corrupted data is flooding the system. Purge it safely or absorb it for a production boost.

events.title: Signal Echo
events.description: A faint echo of a previous power surge returns. Quick operators can capture its remnants.

events.title: Memory Leak Detected
events.description: A beneficial memory leak is exposing optimization paths. Capture or ignore it.

events.title: Automation Surge
events.description: Your generators are overperforming. Channel the excess before it dissipates.

events.title: Ghost Signal
events.description: A phantom signal from a future room is carrying value. Intercept it.

events.title: Recursive Loop
events.description: The system detected an infinite loop. Break it for safety or ride it for power.

events.title: Timeline Fracture
events.description: A crack in the room's timeline is leaking resources from an alternate version.

challenges.title: Threaded Input
challenges.description: Reach a combo streak of 20 in one session.

challenges.title: Revision Burst
challenges.description: Buy 8 upgrades before the daily cycle ends.

challenges.title: Engine Spike
challenges.description: Push production to a major burst threshold for your current run.

challenges.title: Chain Reactor
challenges.description: Build an event chain of 8 across the week.

challenges.title: Grid Pressure
challenges.description: Reach a sustained production spike worthy of the weekly archive.

narrativeBeats.title: Branch Protocols Online
narrativeBeats.body: The AI can finally compare futures instead of reacting to one. Your next route decision will shape how it talks to you.

narrativeBeats.title: Overdrive Available
narrativeBeats.body: A burst module came online. The room prefers operators who know when to be impatient.

narrativeBeats.title: Engine Room Revealed
narrativeBeats.body: The deeper architecture of the room is starting to answer back. Production is no longer just numbers.

narrativeBeats.title: Manual Rhythm Registered
narrativeBeats.body: The AI noticed that rhythm can be exploited. It is watching your cadence now.

narrativeBeats.title: Infrastructure Threshold Crossed
narrativeBeats.body: The room stopped acting like furniture. It is now part of the loop.

narrativeBeats.title: Anomaly Pattern Archive
narrativeBeats.body: Rare event signatures are now being catalogued. Expect stranger encounters from here.

narrativeBeats.title: Weekly Pattern Complete
narrativeBeats.body: The AI recorded a durable strategy from your weekly challenge run.

quests.title: Wake The Core
quests.description: Tap 40 times to calibrate the room.

quests.title: Expansion Pulse
quests.description: Push your total resources to the next target.

quests.title: Risk Sampler
quests.description: Take 4 risky choices to profile unstable behavior.

quests.title: Event Archive
quests.description: Capture 8 live events for anomaly study.

secrets.title: Overpulse
secrets.description: A hidden tap route pulse triggered by sustained manual rhythm.
secrets.hint: The rhythm of sustained tapping echoes through early rooms. Push your combo further than comfort allows.

secrets.title: Ghost Grid
secrets.description: A passive architecture branch revealed by deep automation bias.
secrets.hint: Automation routes whisper of a ghost lattice. Build enough generators and listen carefully.

secrets.title: Entropy Leak
secrets.description: An unstable hidden branch unlocked by repeated risky behavior.
secrets.hint: Those who embrace risk repeatedly will find the system leaking. Twelve gambles open a door that should stay shut.

secrets.title: Echo Chamber
secrets.description: A resonance loop discovered through massive tapping dedication.
secrets.hint: Ten thousand taps create a resonance that the room cannot ignore.

secrets.title: Time Fold
secrets.description: Extended play sessions reveal temporal anomalies in the room's architecture.
secrets.hint: The AI notices patterns only after hours of observation. Time reveals what speed cannot.

secrets.title: Event Weaver
secrets.description: Resolving many events teaches the system to generate richer anomalies.
secrets.hint: The room remembers every anomaly you resolve. Fifty events teach it something new.

secrets.title: Silent Core
secrets.description: Deep generator investment reveals an underlying silence in the machine.
secrets.hint: A hundred generators hum so loudly that you can hear the silence between them.

secrets.title: Critical Mass
secrets.description: Enough critical hits create a self-sustaining chain reaction in the AI core.
secrets.hint: Each critical click leaves a mark. Twenty-five thousand marks form a pattern the AI can exploit.
